deployment_context: Authority recommendation adopted into an institutional decision after reasoned human review.

S.evidence: Source links, corpus manifest, inclusion rules, update date and document versions are recorded.

Q.evidence: Query, filters, issue labels, prompt, retrieval index, model and interface version are reconstructable.

H.evidence: Jurisdiction, court level, legal force, validity, later treatment and relation to governing norms are recorded.

K.evidence: Ranking factors, top-k set, omitted-material checks and counter-authority recall are reviewable.

T.evidence: Affected parties can inspect, challenge, supplement and obtain a recorded response.

L.evidence: The adoption log records adopted and rejected items, reasons, timestamp and responsible reviewer.
